parameters.Comment: scanner-coil-order if shim_meth: Output file format will be chronological-coil and needs to be manually input using AdjValidate or using the Manual Adjustment card.
Output file format will be slicewise-hrd and can directly be read by a supported slicewise shim sequence. Shim orders need to be 0 and/or 1.
parameters.Comment: regularization-factor: Regularization factor for the optimization problem. Higher values will favour lower shim currents at the expense of shim quality.
parameters.Comment: weighting-signal-loss: Weighting factor for the signal loss term in the optimization problem. Recommendation: rmse: 10, mse: 0.01.
parameters.Comment: mask-dilation-kernel-size: Kernel size for the dilation of the mask. Useful to ensure the shimmed region is large enough in the through slice direction when slicewise shimming.
